      Englishen

      Open Application (General)

      • On-site
        • Jepua, Oravainen, Pietasaari, Karjaa, Pohjanmaa, Finland
      • Human resources

      Job description

      Are you looking for new challenges but can't find an open position that fits you? Please leave us an open application. Our company continues to grow, and we are on the lookout for new talents. By filling in this general open application form you can make us aware of your interest in fields other than production. This could mean anything from maintenance to research and development, sales, marketing, logistics, administration or ICT.  




         


      Job requirements

      Requirements concerning education: 

      We put high value on education and wish that you have a high school- level degree. We would also appreciate it if you have a degree that is suitable for the position that you are applying for, but we also value experience and will consider your application if you have acquired suitable experience by working in the field that you are interested in. 


      Requirements on the person:

      As a person we hope that you are open for change and development and that you have a positive attitude towards work. We also hope that you put a high priority on safety. 

      or
